summary: Iter 216 testing — 6 of 7 items PASS. CRITICAL: /api-sandbox route conflicts with Kubernetes ingress /api* prefix rule; URL returns FastAPI 404 instead of serving React SPA. All other items verified working: Goals sub-tab removed, 7 editable assumption fields present, reset-to-base button shows/hides correctly, base scenario has no reset buttons, suggest-optimal-btn renders and clicks, meeting_automation auto-publishes to client_meetings (verified via GET /api/meetings/by-client/thompson_family — source='meeting_automation' present), BrandingProvider injects --brand-primary=#1a2744 and --brand-accent=#D4A84C on :root.

ui_bugs.issue: Route path '/api-sandbox' is intercepted by Kubernetes ingress /api* prefix rule and routed to FastAPI which returns {"detail":"Not Found"} (HTTP 404). The React SPA never receives the request, so the page does not render at all. Same problem will hit any URL that starts with '/api'.

issues: Recharts logs width(-1)/height(-1) warning when chart container is initially collapsed/hidden — cosmetic console noise only

action_items: RENAME the /api-sandbox route to a path that does NOT start with /api (e.g. /sandbox, /developer-sandbox, /open-api-sandbox-runner, or /dev-playground). Update AppRouter.jsx Route path, navData.js path, and lazyPages.js if it references it. The Kubernetes ingress rule sends every /api/* and /api-* path to backend:8001; the frontend SPA never sees the request.
critical_code_review_comments: ApiSandbox route name must avoid '/api' prefix — it is reserved for backend routing by ingress.
BrandingProvider correctly applies defaults synchronously before fetch so first paint is consistent.
RetirementWorkshop InputWithReset cleanly compares numeric values; baseValue is hidden for base scenario via isBase guard — correct.
ApiSandbox.jsx is self-contained but unused once route is broken; fix the path first.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (6/7 features work; 1 blocked by route conflict)

test_credentials: No login. LocalStorage compliance bypass used.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 meeting_automation record (David Thompson, annual_review, 2026-05-27) via POST /api/meeting-automation/generate-notes
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent renames /api-sandbox to non-/api path, re-test (a) the renamed page loads with [data-testid='api-sandbox'], (b) nav link points to the new path, (c) GET endpoint execute returns 200, (d) POST endpoint reveals body textarea. All other Iter 216 items already verified passing — no need to re-run.
rca of the issue: Kubernetes ingress in this environment forwards any path matching /api or /api-* to the backend FastAPI service at port 8001. The route '/api-sandbox' matches this prefix rule. FastAPI has no /api-sandbox endpoint registered, so it returns HTTP 404 {"detail":"Not Found"}. The React SPA bundle never receives the navigation request, so AppRouter cannot match the React Route. Reproduction: curl https://decision-engine-109.preview.emergentagent.com/api-sandbox -> returns 404 JSON from FastAPI (Content-Type application/json) instead of HTML. Mitigation: rename the React route and nav entry to a path that does not start with /api (e.g. /sandbox or /developer-sandbox). No backend changes required.
